'''zochayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swallowable|swallowable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swallowable|swallowable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zochayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochayithi|zochayithi]] || [[word:zochayiji|zochayiji]] || [[word:zochayishi|zochayishi]] || [[word:zochayiki|zochayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochayuthuthu|zochayuthuthu]] || [[word:zochayujuju|zochayujuju]] || [[word:zochayushushu|zochayushushu]] || [[word:zochayukuku|zochayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochayuthu|zochayuthu]] || [[word:zochayuju|zochayuju]] || [[word:zochayushu|zochayushu]] || [[word:zochayuku|zochayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochayufthuf|zochayufthuf]] || [[word:zochayufjuf|zochayufjuf]] || [[word:zochayufshuf|zochayufshuf]] || [[word:zochayufkuf|zochayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochayethe|zochayethe]] || [[word:zochayeje|zochayeje]] || [[word:zochayeshe|zochayeshe]] || [[word:zochayeke|zochayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochayothotho|zochayothotho]] || [[word:zochayojojo|zochayojojo]] || [[word:zochayoshosho|zochayoshosho]] || [[word:zochayokoko|zochayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochayotho|zochayotho]] || [[word:zochayojo|zochayojo]] || [[word:zochayosho|zochayosho]] || [[word:zochayoko|zochayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochayofthof|zochayofthof]] || [[word:zochayofjof|zochayofjof]] || [[word:zochayofshof|zochayofshof]] || [[word:zochayofkof|zochayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochayïfthïf|zochayïfthïf]] || [[word:zochayïfjïf|zochayïfjïf]] || [[word:zochayïfshïf|zochayïfshïf]] || [[word:zochayïfkïf|zochayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochayïfthïfthïf|zochayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zochayïfjïfjïf|zochayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zochayïfshïfshïf|zochayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zochayïfkïfkïf|zochayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochayïfthïf|zochayïfthïf]] || [[word:zochayïfjïf|zochayïfjïf]] || [[word:zochayïfshïf|zochayïfshïf]] || [[word:zochayïfkïf|zochayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochayïfthïf|zochayïfthïf]] || [[word:zochayïfjïf|zochayïfjïf]] || [[word:zochayïfshïf|zochayïfshïf]] || [[word:zochayïfkïf|zochayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochayæthæ|zochayæthæ]] || [[word:zochayæjæ|zochayæjæ]] || [[word:zochayæshæ|zochayæshæ]] || [[word:zochayækæ|zochayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochayathatha|zochayathatha]] || [[word:zochayajaja|zochayajaja]] || [[word:zochayashasha|zochayashasha]] || [[word:zochayakaka|zochayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochayatha|zochayatha]] || [[word:zochayaja|zochayaja]] || [[word:zochayasha|zochayasha]] || [[word:zochayaka|zochayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochayafthaf|zochayafthaf]] || [[word:zochayafjaf|zochayafjaf]] || [[word:zochayafshaf|zochayafshaf]] || [[word:zochayafkaf|zochayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zochayasha|zochayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zochayshësha|zochayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zochayrosha|zochayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zochaymusha|zochaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zochayasha|zochayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozochaynkshësha|gozochaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozochaynkrosha|gozochaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozochaynkmusha|gozochaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozochaynkyasha|gozochaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zochachayasha|zochachayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zochachayshësha|zochachayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zochachayrosha|zochachayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zochachaymusha|zochachaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zochachayasha|zochachayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozochachaynkshësha|gozochachaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozochachaynkrosha|gozochachaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozochachaynkmusha|gozochachaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozochachaynkyasha|gozochachaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zechæyasha|zechæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zechæyshësha|zechæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zechæyrosha|zechæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zechæymusha|zechæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zechæyasha|zechæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozechæynkshësha|gozechæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozechæynkrosha|gozechæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozechæynkmusha|gozechæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozechæynkyasha|gozechæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zochfayasha|zochfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zochfayshësha|zochfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zochfayrosha|zochfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zochfaymusha|zochfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zochfayasha|zochfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozochfaynkshësha|gozochfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozochfaynkrosha|gozochfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozochfaynkmusha|gozochfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozochfaynkyasha|gozochfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
